name: cloneTable
description: Clones a source Google Docs table into a target document, preserving text, column widths, row styles, cell styles, and pinned header rows where supported.

documentId.description: The document ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Docs URL.

sourceDocumentId.description: Document ID containing the source table template.

sourceTableId.description: Source MCP table ID from listDocumentTables.

index.description: 1-based character index in the target document where the cloned table should be inserted.

sourceTabId.description: Optional tab ID for the source document table.

targetTabId.description: Optional tab ID for the target document insertion point.

copyColumnWidths.description: Copy fixed column widths from the source table.

copyRowStyles.description: Copy row min height and overflow settings from the source table.

copyCellStyles.description: Copy cell-level formatting such as background, padding, alignment, and borders.

copyPinnedHeaderRows.description: Copy pinned header rows from the source table when present.

copyHeaderBold.description: Apply bold text to cloned cells whose source cell text was bold.
